introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Sacramento, The Azizi Firm is here to help. California's capital city sees heavy traffic from government workers, commuters, and agricultural transport creating serious accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Sacramento car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on congested freeways, T-bone accidents at urban intersections, head-on collisions on rural roads, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving agricultural transport, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and bicycle accidents in Midtown.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Sacramento
sections.body: Sacramento's position at the crossroads of I-5, I-80, US-50, and SR-99 creates heavy through-traffic and commuter congestion. Common accident causes include distracted driving, speeding on the Capital City Freeway, drunk driving near the downtown and midtown entertainment districts, fatigued commercial truck drivers on long hauls, and agricultural equipment on rural roads. Our attorneys conduct thorough accident investigations.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Sacramento?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention immediately, document the scene, exchange information with all involved parties, get witness contacts, file a report with Sacramento PD or CHP, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance adjusters. If the accident involves a government vehicle, special rules apply.

faq.question: How much is my Sacramento car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages including government and private sector earnings, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Sacramento County juries tend to be fair and reasonable. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We have extensive experience with Sacramento courts and the local legal community, ensuring your case gets the attention and expertise it deserves.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Sacramento, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
